news_bbc.title: Ryanair profits drop as Iran war puts off passengers and lifts fuel costs
news_bbc.summary: The Irish airline said oil prices had increased costs meanwhile Brent crude surpassed $90.

news_bbc.title: Are you a parent missing out on £27 a week? Here's how to check
news_bbc.summary: Thousands of new parents fail to claim child benefit until it is too late to receive some of the money, HMRC says.

news_bbc.title: Thames Water lenders preparing legal challenge in event of Burnham nationalisation
news_bbc.summary: The BBC understands creditors would would pursue payment in full of the outstanding debts, in the multi-billions of pounds.

news_bbc.title: My fitness tracker knew I was pregnant before I did
news_bbc.summary: Ravika is one of hundreds of women who are noticing early pregnancy signs through the data on their fitness trackers.

news_bbc.title: New EU border system tripling time at passport control, airport boss says
news_bbc.summary: Ryanair has also warned passengers travelling to Europe this summer to prepare for extended waits.

news_bbc.title: This farmer wanted to quit the cocaine industry - he couldn't
news_bbc.summary: Colombians who grow cocaine's raw material bemoan a lack of support to help them switch crops.

news_bbc.title: Chinese firm seeks compensation over British Steel nationalisation
news_bbc.summary: Jingye said it will take action "through legal means to the very end" after the UK government nationalised British Steel.

news_bbc.title: 'My buyers dropped their offer by £15,000 the day before exchange': Gazundering and how to avoid it
news_bbc.summary: It's a small but growing problem in the property market - here's how to protect yourself.
